actual.title: Stale Reference Lifecycle
actual.rootCause: Primary Cause: nil concatenation: a stale reference survived across a timing boundary Intermediate Cause(s): A stale reference crossed an async or respawn boundary without a freshness check Surface Error: attempt to concatenate nil at the string boundary
actual.fix: Refresh the reference after the lifecycle boundary and guard against nil.

actual.title: DataStore Reliability
actual.rootCause: Primary Cause: missing resiliency: the request was executed without pcall, retry, or budget awareness Intermediate Cause(s): The failure propagated as a throttled or transient request error Surface Error: A DataStore failure surfaced at the request boundary
actual.fix: Wrap DataStore calls in pcall and handle failures.

actual.title: Nil Lifetime Breakdown
actual.rootCause: Primary Cause: nil comparison: the dependency was not initialized before first use Intermediate Cause(s): A lookup, return, or sync boundary propagated nil into the failing access Surface Error: attempt to compare nil at the comparison boundary
actual.fix: Guard the exact access/call with a nil check before using the value.

actual.title: Generic Runtime Context
actual.rootCause: Primary Cause: Value is nil at runtime: initialization or dependency resolution failed before the access Intermediate Cause(s): The dependency or object state propagated without a verified readiness signal Surface Error: The runtime failure reached the generic fallback path
actual.fix: Trace the highlighted symbol and add runtime guards at the failing access line.

actual.fix: Wrap DataStore calls in pcall and handle failures.

actual.title: Nil Lifetime Breakdown
actual.rootCause: Primary Cause: nil at call site: the dependency was not initialized before first use Intermediate Cause(s): WaitForChild resolves the dependency before use Surface Error: attempt to call nil at the invocation site
actual.fix: Guard the exact access/call with a nil check before using the value.
